problem.title: CT-ICP gap-closing on KITTI Odometry 07 (full)
problem.question: How much does increasing optimization budget (max_iter, ceres_iter, max_frames_in_map) close the 9x gap to paper RPE 0.30% on KITTI 07?

variants.label: Baseline default (8616c27, RPE 2.70%)
variants.intent: Reference: existing default profile (voxel 1.5, max_iter 8, ceres_iter 1).

variants.label: max_iter 12, ceres_iter 6, larger map
variants.intent: Push the optimization budget close to what the paper uses.

variants.label: dense + ceres_iter 6 + max_frames 20
variants.intent: Combine built-in dense profile with extra ceres budget and longer map memory.
